heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 26104 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments2008—Subsec. (a)(1). substituted “$30,000,000” for “$70,000,000”.Pub. L. 110–4322005— amended heading and text of section generally. Prior to amendment, text consisted of subsecs. (a) to (h) relating to authorization of appropriations for fiscal years 1995 through 2001 and availability of funds.Pub. L. 109–591998—Subsecs. (d) to (h). added subsecs. (d) to (g) and redesignated former subsec. (d) as (h).Pub. L. 105–178
amendments: Amendments2008—Subsec. (a)(1). substituted “$30,000,000” for “$70,000,000”.Pub. L. 110–4322005— amended heading and text of section generally. Prior to amendment, text consisted of subsecs. (a) to (h) relating to authorization of appropriations for fiscal years 1995 through 2001 and availability of funds.Pub. L. 109–591998—Subsecs. children.heading: .—Funds To Remain Available
children.label: b .—Funds To Remain Available
children.text: Funds made available under this section shall remain available until expended.
